note: Hardcoded FALLBACK answers for special-bet superlatives. Priority: the live feed/API is preferred when available (it's fresher); a field here is used ONLY when that field has no live data (e.g. cards/assists with no API key). If a field has neither, it shows 'לא זמין'. Ties: list every leader; all pickers of any listed entry are scored. Team fields use FIFA codes (see teams.json); player fields use canonical Hebrew names (player_alias.json). `value` is the metric (goals/cards/assists) shown in the UI.
